name: Credential File Access
description: Monitor access attempts to sensitive credential files like /etc/shadow, SAM, NTDS.dit
query:
// Credential File Access Detection
// Access to password/credential files
events from endpoint
where file_path in ("/etc/shadow", "/etc/passwd", "/etc/gshadow")
  or file_path contains "SAM"
  or file_path contains "NTDS.dit"
  or file_path contains "SECURITY"
group by hostname, username, file_path
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
